overview.value: Moth Orchid is a common indoor orchid with long-lasting blooms. It grows in bark mix, prefers filtered light, and needs roots that can breathe.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"Moth Orchid","overview":"Moth Orchid is a common indoor orchid with long-lasting blooms. It grows in bark mix, prefers filtered light, and needs roots that can breathe.","tips":"Keep the crown dry and let excess water drain fully after watering."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"蝴蝶兰","overview":"蝴蝶兰是常见室内兰花，花期较长。它通常种在树皮介质中，喜欢过滤光和透气的根系环境。","tips":"浇水后让多余水分充分流走，并保持叶心干燥。"}}
